source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A power system with two generators is shown in the <image>. The system (generators, buses, and transmission lines) is protected by six overcurrent relays \( R_1 \) to \( R_6 \). Assuming a mix of directional and nondirectional relays at appropriate locations, the remote backup relays for \( R_4 \) are:

answer_present=true and registry_passed=true, so the sample assets appear available for downstream checking
